# 🚀 Pull Request Template

## 📝 Related Issue
Closes #

## 📋 Summary
Provide a brief summary of the changes made and the problem they solve.

## 🛠️ Changes Made
- [ ] Description of change 1
- [ ] Description of change 2

## 🧪 Testing Verification
Detail how these changes were tested:
- **Local Unit Testing**: (e.g., ran `.venv\Scripts\pytest` and all tests passed)
- **Manual Verification**: (e.g., loaded local Flask server, added/deleted assets, and verified SIP calculations)
- **UI Responsiveness**: (e.g., checked sidebar animations, dashboard layout spacing, and modal views)

## 📸 Screenshots / Demos
*If UI changes are included, add before/after screenshots or GIFs.*

## 🌟 Impact
How does this contribution improve the repository?

## 🏁 Checklist
- [ ] Code follows project conventions and style guidelines
- [ ] Tested locally and verified correctness
- [ ] Contains no unrelated or extraneous formatting changes
- [ ] Mobile responsive layout verified (for frontend work)
- [ ] Accessibility standards met (ARIA tags, keyboard navigation)
- [ ] Security standards followed (no hardcoded keys/secrets, sanitization enabled)
- [ ] All CI test checks pass successfully
